Chests.name: Caixas
Chests.desc: Reduz bastante a quantidade de material necessario para produzir qualquer uma das caixas.
AltFertilizers.name: Fertilizantes Alternativos
AltFertilizers.desc: It adds alternative fertilizers to the game, which can be used to fertilize crops.
Sprinklers.name: Sprinklers
Sprinklers.desc: It adds sprinklers to the game, which can be used to water crops automatically.
AddMoss.name: Add Moss
AddMoss.desc: It adds moss to the game, which can be used for various crafting recipes.
Fences.name: Fences
Fences.desc: It reduces the amount of materials needed to produce the fences.
